a.xlink:title: A specialized GroupCell that provides empty vertical space for alignment.
A cell grouping input (and, if there is one, also the output) cell to a foldable item.
The base class all cell types the worksheet can consist of are derived from.
Objects deriving from this class can be observed by the CellPtr.
An implementation detail for the type-specific templated cell pointers.
The storage for pointers to cells.
The configuration storage for the current worksheet.
A list of editor cells containing error messages.
